## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` reports no files
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go build ./cmd/arb` succeeds
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for this change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Change is small and focused (single purpose)
